`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input shift_ena,
    input count_ena,
    input data,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (shift_ena) begin
        q <= {data, q[3:1]};
    end else if (count_ena) begin
        if (q == 4'b0000) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1'b1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input shift_ena,
    input count_ena,
    input data,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (shift_ena) begin
        q <= {data, q[3:1]};
    end else if (count_ena) begin
        if (q == 4'd0) begin
            q <= 4'd0;
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1;
        end
    end else begin
        q <= q;
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
  input clk,
  input resetn,
  input [1:0] byteena,
  input [15:0] d,
  output reg [15:0] q
);

always @ (posedge clk) begin
  if (~resetn) begin
    q <= 16'd0;
  end else begin
    if (byteena[1]) begin
      q[15:8] <= d[15:8];
    end
    if (byteena[0]) begin
      q[7:0] <= d[7:0];
    end
  end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
  input clk,
  input areset,
  input train_valid,
  input train_taken,
  output reg [1:0] state
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
  if (areset) begin
    state <= 2'b01;
  end else if (train_valid) begin
    if (train_taken) begin
      if (state == 2'b11) begin
        state <= 2'b11;
      end else begin
        state <= state + 1'b1;
      end
    end else begin
      if (state == 2'b00) begin
        state <= 2'b00;
      end else begin
        state <= state - 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input train_valid,
    input train_taken,
    output reg [1:0] state
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if (areset) begin
        state <= 2'b01;
    end else if (train_valid) begin
        if (train_taken) begin
            if (state < 2'b11) begin
                state <= state + 1;
            end
        end else begin
            if (state > 2'b00) begin
                state <= state - 1;
            end
        end
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input train_valid,
    input train_taken,
    output reg [1:0] state
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if (areset) begin
        state <= 2'b01;
    end else if (train_valid) begin
        if (train_taken) begin
            if (state < 2'b11) begin
                state <= state + 2'b01;
            end
        end else begin
            if (state > 2'b00) begin
                state <= state - 2'b01;
            end
        end
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input S,
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    output reg Z
);

reg [7:0] Q;

always @(posedge clk)
begin
    if (enable)
    begin
        Q[7:1] <= Q[6:0];
        Q[0] <= S;
    end
end

assign Z = (A == 1'b0 && B == 1'b0 && C == 1'b0) ? Q[0] :
            (A == 1'b0 && B == 1'b0 && C == 1'b1) ? Q[1] :
            (A == 1'b0 && B == 1'b1 && C == 1'b0) ? Q[2] :
            (A == 1'b0 && B == 1'b1 && C == 1'b1) ? Q[3] :
            (A == 1'b1 && B == 1'b0 && C == 1'b0) ? Q[4] :
            (A == 1'b1 && B == 1'b0 && C == 1'b1) ? Q[5] :
            (A == 1'b1 && B == 1'b1 && C == 1'b0) ? Q[6] :
            (A == 1'b1 && B == 1'b1 && C == 1'b1) ? Q[7] : 1'bx;

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input S,
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    output Z
);

reg [7:0] Q;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (enable) begin
        Q[7] <= S;
        for (int i = 6; i >= 0; i--) begin
            Q[i] <= Q[i+1];
        end
    end
end

assign Z = (A == 0 && B == 0 && C == 0) ? Q[0] :
            (A == 0 && B == 0 && C == 1) ? Q[1] :
            (A == 0 && B == 1 && C == 0) ? Q[2] :
            (A == 0 && B == 1 && C == 1) ? Q[3] :
            (A == 1 && B == 0 && C == 0) ? Q[4] :
            (A == 1 && B == 0 && C == 1) ? Q[5] :
            (A == 1 && B == 1 && C == 0) ? Q[6] :
            (A == 1 && B == 1 && C == 1) ? Q[7] : 1'bx;

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input load,
    input ena,
    input [3:0] data,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

always @ (posedge areset or posedge clk) begin
    if (areset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else if (ena) begin
        q <= {1'b0, q[3:1]};
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input x,
    output reg z
);

reg [1:0] state;

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset)
begin
    if (areset)
    begin
        state <= 2'b01; // one-hot encoding for state A
        z <= 0;
    end
    else
    begin
        case (state)
            2'b01: // state A
            begin
                if (x)
                begin
                    state <= 2'b10; // one-hot encoding for state B
                    z <= 1;
                end
                else
                begin
                    state <= 2'b01; // stay in state A
                    z <= 0;
                end
            end
            2'b10: // state B
            begin
                if (x)
                begin
                    state <= 2'b10; // stay in state B
                    z <= 0;
                end
                else
                begin
                    state <= 2'b10; // stay in state B
                    z <= 1;
                end
            end
            default:
            begin
                state <= 2'b01; // reset to state A
                z <= 0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input in,
    input [1:0] state,
    output [1:0] next_state,
    output out
);

assign next_state = (state == 2'b00 && !in) ? 2'b00 :
                    (state == 2'b00 && in)  ? 2'b01 :
                    (state == 2'b01 && !in) ? 2'b10 :
                    (state == 2'b01 && in)  ? 2'b01 :
                    (state == 2'b10 && !in) ? 2'b00 :
                    (state == 2'b10 && in)  ? 2'b11 :
                    (state == 2'b11 && !in) ? 2'b10 :
                    (state == 2'b11 && in)  ? 2'b01 : 2'b00;

assign out = (state == 2'b11) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [1:0] ena,
    input [99:0] data,
    output reg [99:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else if (ena == 2'b01) begin
        q <= {q[0], q[99:1]};
    end else if (ena == 2'b10) begin
        q <= {q[98:0], q[99]};
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [1:0] ena,
    input [99:0] data,
    output reg [99:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else begin
        case (ena)
            2'b01: q <= {q[0], q[99:1]}; // rotate right
            2'b10: q <= {q[98:0], q[99]}; // rotate left
            default: q <= q; // no rotation
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [511:0] data,
    output reg [511:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= data;
    end else begin
        for (int i = 0; i < 512; i++) begin
            if (i == 0) begin
                q[i] <= q[i+1];
            end else if (i == 511) begin
                q[i] <= q[i-1];
            end else begin
                q[i] <= q[i-1] ^ q[i+1];
            end
        end
    end
end

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input in,
    output reg out
);

reg state;

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if(areset) begin
        state <= 1'b1; // Reset to state B
        out <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        case(state)
            1'b0: // State A
            begin
                if(in) begin
                    state <= 1'b0; // Stay in state A
                    out <= 1'b1;
                end else begin
                    state <= 1'b1; // Go to state B
                    out <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            1'b1: // State B
            begin
                if(in) begin
                    state <= 1'b1; // Stay in state B
                    out <= 1'b0;
                end else begin
                    state <= 1'b0; // Go to state A
                    out <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule

module TopModule (
  input do_sub,
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  output reg [7:0] out,
  output reg result_is_zero
);

begin

  endcase

module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input bump_left,
    input bump_right,
    output walk_left,
    output walk_right
);

reg [1:0] present_state, next_state;

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if (areset) begin
        present_state <= 2'b01;
    end else begin
        present_state <= next_state;
    end
end

always @(*) begin
    case (present_state)
        2'b01: begin // walking left
            if (bump_left) begin
                next_state = 2'b10; // switch to walking right
            end else begin
                next_state = 2'b01; // continue walking left
            end
        end
        2'b10: begin // walking right
            if (bump_right) begin
                next_state = 2'b01; // switch to walking left
            end else begin
                next_state = 2'b10; // continue walking right
            end
        end
        default: begin
            next_state = 2'b01; // default to walking left
        end
    endcase
end

assign walk_left = (present_state == 2'b01);
assign walk_right = (present_state == 2'b10);

endmodule

`timescale 1ps/1ps
module TopModule(
    input clk,
    input resetn,
    input [2:0] r,
    output [2:0] g
);

reg [1:0] state;
reg [1:0] next_state;

always @(*)
begin
    case(state)
        2'b00: // State A
            begin
                if(r[0] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b01; // State B
                else if(r[1] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b10; // State C
                else if(r[2] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b11; // State D
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b01: // State B
            begin
                if(r[0] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b01; // State B
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b10: // State C
            begin
                if(r[1] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b10; // State C
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        2'b11: // State D
            begin
                if(r[2] == 1'b1)
                    next_state = 2'b11; // State D
                else
                    next_state = 2'b00; // State A
            end
        default:
            next_state = 2'b00; // State A
    endcase
end

always @(posedge clk)
begin
    if(~resetn)
        state <= 2'b00; // Reset to State A
    else
        state <= next_state;
end

assign g[0] = (state == 2'b01); // State B
assign g[1] = (state == 2'b10); // State C
assign g[2] = (state == 2'b11); // State D

endmodule

module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input areset,
    input predict_valid,
    input [6:0] predict_pc,
    output predict_taken,
    output [6:0] predict_history,
    input train_valid,
    input train_taken,
    input train_mispredicted,
    input [6:0] train_history,
    input [6:0] train_pc
);

reg [6:0] global_history;
reg [1:0] pht [127:0];

always @(posedge clk or posedge areset) begin
    if (areset) begin
        global_history <= 7'b0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 128; i++) begin
            pht[i] <= 2'b0;
        end
    end else begin
        if (train_valid) begin
            if (train_mispredicted) begin
                global_history <= train_history;
            end
            if (train_taken) begin
                pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] <= (pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] == 2'b11) ? 2'b11 : pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] + 1'b1;
            end else begin
                pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] <= (pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] == 2'b00) ? 2'b00 : pht[{train_pc[6:1], train_history[6]}] - 1'b1;
            end
        end
        if (predict_valid && !train_valid || predict_valid && train_valid && !train_mispredicted) begin
            global_history <= {global_history[5:0], (pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b11 || pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b10)};
        end
    end
end

assign predict_taken = (pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b11 || pht[{predict_pc[6:1], global_history[6]}] == 2'b10);
assign predict_history = global_history;

endmodule
